## What does this PR do?

## For additions: evidence of from-scratch pretraining

<!--
REQUIRED for new entries. Link to the specific paper section, model card statement,
or training config demonstrating random initialization.

A model continued-pretrained from an existing checkpoint does not qualify, regardless
of how many tokens it subsequently saw. If you're unsure, say so — we'd rather discuss
it than get it wrong.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] Entry is placed in alphabetical order within its section
- [ ] Description is one sentence, factual, ending with a period
- [ ] All links resolve and point to canonical sources
- [ ] Evidence of from-scratch pretraining is provided above (additions only)
- [ ] Reference tables updated, if applicable (`reference/architectures.md`, `reference/corpora.md`)
- [ ] `npx awesome-lint` passes locally

## Anything uncertain?

<!--
Flag it here rather than smoothing it over. "The paper doesn't state the tokenizer
vocab size" is a useful note; a guessed number is not. `Not disclosed` is always an
acceptable value in the tables.
-->
